backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: reducing navigation link spacing in SiteHeader and adding two new YouTube videos to HomePage with uniform sizing.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files documenting component purposes, styling changes (reduced spacing, scaled text), and feature implementations including video additions and text size adjustments.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for backgrounds, borders, and UI elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the MORSHID application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining three routes (/, /for-farmers, /contact) with SiteLayout as root component and corresponding page components.
frontend/src/components/LogoPopup.tsx: Modal popup component with backdrop overlay displaying MORSHID tagline message with close button and click-outside-to-close functionality.
frontend/src/components/MorshidButton.ts: Wrapper around shadcn Button component with text-base sizing, rounded-lg corners, and hover shadow effect as default styling.
frontend/src/components/MorshidCard.tsx: Wrapper around shadcn Card component with white background, shadow-md, rounded-lg corners, and optional colored top border accent.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component with dark green background displaying MORSHID logo, contact info at text-base, and Caffeine.ai attribution at text-sm.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header with MORSHID logo and navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) using gap-3 spacing, with active route highlighted in #25D366 green.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloating: Fixed bottom-right floating button linking to WhatsApp with #25D366 background color and hover scale/shadow effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook providing Internet Identity authentication with login/logout functionality, identity state management, and AuthClient configuration with idle handling disabled by default.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for MORSHID brand colors (#25D366 green theme) and design tokens in OKLCH color space for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/layouts/SiteLayout.tsx: Main layout component that wraps pages with SiteHeader, SiteFooter, and WhatsAppFloatingButton, using TanStack Router's Outlet for nested route rendering.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying three communication channels (WhatsApp, Email, Phone) in card layout with icons and CTAs, plus a location section for Rabat, Morocco.
frontend/src/pages/ForFarmersPage.tsx: Farmer-focused landing page with hero section and service cards showcasing MORSHID's offerings: crop care advice, disease detection, market prices, and product sourcing, all via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage featuring hero section with MORSHID logo popup, four pillar cards (Smart Farming, Security, Market Access, Services), and WhatsApp CTA promoting the farming companion platform.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with MORSHID brand colors, OKLCH color system variables, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a 3-page MORSHID website (Home, For Farmers, Contact) with shared header/footer, WhatsApp integration, and detailed marketing sections. Includes architectural notes, known styling issues (color consistency, button/card standardization), and a comprehensive feature/task history.
